name: Eshwari
wish: Happy Birthday to my favourite cutie, Darshan MP 💖 My naughty, funny Benne Dose Boy 😝❤️ No matter how much you tease me, you’ll always be my favourite. You bring smiles, fun, and madness everywhere.May your day be full of laughter, love, and happiness. Love you lots 🥰🎂✨

name: Shruthi
wish: Happy Birthday Darshan MP! 🎉 Our biggest extrovert headache 😌 You’re truly talented—dance, anchoring, comedy—you do everything so well.YENRI NIMMA TALENT 😅 Happy Birthday once again ❤️

name: Lakshitha
wish: Happy Birthday Darshan MP ❤️ My energetic Professor 😝 You’re my air cooler in stressful moments with your silly jokes. Stay happy, naughty, and full of life always. Wishing you lots of happiness 🥰🎂✨

name: Spoorthi
wish: Happy Birthday to the most stylish boy in Mahesh PU College 😌✨ Class hero of many hearts 😎 Thank you for helping me during exams and always motivating me to believe in myself. Wishing you happiness, success, and love 🎂✨

name: Pallavi
wish: Happy Birthday Darshan 🎉 I still remember when I met you, acting all shy and introvert when I asked for your number 🥴😂 Who knew you’d become the famous boy of our class! Everyone knows you now 😎 Your presentations and seminars are amazing. Stay funny, famous, and helpful. Wishing you happiness, success, and a jolly life ahead 🎂✨
